heading: Annual reports: exclusion of irrelevant matter
label: 1113 Annual reports: exclusion of irrelevant matter
text: Executive officers, before transmitting their annual reports, shall carefully examine them and all accompanying documents, and exclude all matter, including engravings, maps, drawings, and illustrations, except such as they certify in their letters transmitting the reports are necessary and relate entirely to the transaction of the public business.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 219 (part) (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 9428 Stat. 623This section incorporates only the second clause of former section 219. The balance will be found in section 1102 of the revision.
